title: guettarda elongata
intro: Guettarda elongata, also known as the 'Guettarda' or 'Long-stalked Guettarda', is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Guettarda elongata include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Guettarda elongata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its leaves and roots are often used in traditional herbal remedies.
